allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ingest -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"course":"TEST","week":"1","lesson":"SmokeTest","raw_text":"REST is an architectural style for distributed systems. It uses HTTP verbs like GET and POST."}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ingest -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"course":"VERIFY","week":"0","lesson":"PostFixSmoke","raw_text":"Python is a high-level interpreted programming language used for web development, data science, and AI."}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ingest -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"course":"BE101","week":"3","lesson":"The DOM, your page as a live tree","raw_text":"The DOM is a live tree of objects in the browser, built from HTML. Edits in DevTools change the DOM but not the original HTML file."}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} entries; lessons: {[e[\\"lesson\\"] for e in d]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} entries; lessons: {[\(e[\\"course\\"], e[\\"lesson\\"]\) for e in d]}'\)")

Bash(curl -sN -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ingest -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"course":"BE101","week":"3","lesson":"The DOM, your page as a living tree","raw_text":"The DOM is a live tree of objects in the browser, built from HTML on disk. Edits in DevTools change the DOM but not the original HTML file."}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} entries:'\); [print\(f'  {e[\\"course\\"]} / week {e[\\"week\\"]} / {e[\\"lesson\\"]}'\) for e in d]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); dom = next\(\(e for e in d if e['lesson'] == 'The DOM, your page as a living tree'\), None\); print\(json.dumps\(dom, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(curl -sN -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/advisor/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"what is the difference between ul and ol in 2 sentences"}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"nodes: {len\(d['nodes']\)}, links: {len\(d['links']\)}\\"\); print\('top links:'\); [print\(f\\"  {l['weight']:>2} shared: {l['shared'][:3]}\\"\) for l in sorted\(d['links'], key=lambda x: -x['weight']\)[:5]]")
